meaning: n.原意:耶路撒冷的一个迦南要塞,后指锡安山n.耶路撒冷,以色列的土地,犹太人,天国,神权政治,基督教会
examples: Oh, that salvation for Israel would come out of Zion!
Say it,Zion,Mount Zion which is where Jerusalem is founded.
The Lord reigns forever, your God, o Zion, for all generations.
Systems administrators, network security specialists and help-desk technicians are still in demand, says Mr. Zion.
Coleman was born on February 8, 1968, and raised in Zion, Illinois, near Chicago.
